original_text: On the strategic front, NVIDIA's recent multiyear agreements to invest $2 billion each in Coherent and Lumentum, alongside multibillion-dollar purchase commitments and future capacity rights, suggests management is proactively redefining its moat by pre-buying advanced optics capacity [0aa6a797-836f-43db-8358-724d2dac0a0b]. Analyst reactions remain mixed, with Deutsche Bank raising its price target to $220 while Bank of America reset its price target following the earnings report [de81755d-f657-4d81-ac51-0e4d3302477e, 09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c].
revised_text: On the strategic front, NVIDIA's recent multiyear agreements to invest $2 billion each in Coherent and Lumentum, alongside multibillion-dollar purchase commitments and future capacity rights, suggests management is proactively redefining its moat by pre-buying advanced optics capacity [0aa6a797-836f-43db-8358-724d2dac0a0b]. Following the earnings report, Bank of America reset its price target [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c].
changes_summary: Removed the unsupported claim regarding Deutsche Bank raising its price target to $220 and the characterization of analyst reactions as 'mixed' as no evidence was found in the provided chunks. Retained the Bank of America price target reset claim with the correct citation [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c]. Retained the strategic investment details regarding Coherent and Lumentum supported by chunk [0aa6a797-836f-43db-8358-724d2dac0a0b].
